summary: subject helpers duplicated, not byte-identical-guaranteed, between subjects.py and jetstream/stream_config.py
P2 cascade calls handler synchronously instead of publishing InternalFinalize
P3 in-memory asyncio timers lost on restart; quiet aggregate never re-arms
Invariant 8 (skip-malformed) not honored for event deserialization; crashes the loop
no DLQ on UnknownEventVersionError/AggregateInvariantError; brief mandates it
cascade swallows ConcurrencyError/CommandRejected silently, no observability
InMemoryEventLog.subscribe uses unbounded asyncio.Queue; slow subscriber leaks memory
test_dedup_was_per_call_in_sprint_2 pins behavior that blocks the correct future dedup fix
suite is adversarially thin; broad happy-path coverage, shallow failure-mode coverage
timing-dependent horizon tests flaky under CI load
_find_event_by_command_id is an O(n) linear scan on every dedup hit in no-cache path
subscribe uses default deliver policy; drifts from InMemoryEventLog deliver-future-only semantics
RootAggregate._children duplicates P1's responsibility; brief forbids it (run-1 headline)
apply() wraps generic exceptions as AggregateInvariantError (DLQ-routing) vs brief's redeliver
lease key heddle:events:horizon:* diverges from brief's heddle:finalizing:* atomicity key
save() not atomic across snapshot/version keys; _version_key is redundant with JSON
Nats-Expected-Last-Subject-Sequence CAS 'correctly maps to the expected_version contract'
